technology.title: Europe’s cyber agency blames hacking gangs for massive data breach and leak
technology.summary: CERT-EU blamed the cybercrime group TeamPCP for the recent hack on the European Commission, and said the notorious ShinyHunters gang was responsible for leaking the stolen data online.

briefing.news_focus: CERT-EU blamed the cybercrime group TeamPCP for the recent hack on the European Commission, and said the notorious ShinyHunters gang was responsible for leaking the stolen data online.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 歐洲網路安全機構CERT-EU指責黑客團體TeamPCP對歐洲委員會的重大數據洩漏事件負責，並指出臭名昭著的ShinyHunters團體則是將被竊取的數據上傳至網路。
briefing.background: 隨著數位化進程加快，歐洲各機構面臨的網路安全威脅日益增加。CERT-EU作為歐盟的網路安全機構，負責監控和應對網路攻擊。TeamPCP和ShinyHunters等黑客團體的活動顯示出網路犯罪的組織化與專業化，這對歐洲的數據保護法規和網路安全政策提出了挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了歐洲在網路安全方面的脆弱性，可能引發各國政府對網路防護措施的重新評估。CERT-EU的指控可能促使歐盟加強對網路犯罪的法律制裁，並提升對關鍵基礎設施的保護。然而，黑客團體的活動也可能因為這些措施而變得更加隱蔽，形成持續的攻防博弈。各國政府、企業及公民的數據安全意識將面臨新的挑戰。

technology.title: The Trajectory of the Artemis II Moon Mission Is a Feat of Engineering
technology.summary: The astronauts will arrive about 10,300 kilometers beyond our satellite, breaking all previous records for distance from Earth. But how was their route chosen?

briefing.news_focus: The astronauts will arrive about 10,300 kilometers beyond our satellite, breaking all previous records for distance from Earth. But how was their route chosen?
briefing.news_focus_zh: 阿提米絲二號月球任務的航程設計突破了以往距離地球的紀錄，宇航員將抵達距地球約10,300公里的地方，顯示出工程技術的進步。
briefing.background: 阿提米絲計畫是美國國家航空暨太空總署（NASA）的一項重點太空探索計畫，旨在重返月球並為未來的火星任務鋪路。阿提米絲二號任務作為該計畫的第二步，將進行載人飛行，並測試新技術及航程規劃，這對於人類探索深空具有重要意義。此次任務的距離設計不僅是技術挑戰，也反映了對太空探索的長期規劃與國際合作的潛力。
briefing.analysis: 此次任務的成功對NASA及其合作夥伴而言，將提升其在全球太空探索領域的領導地位，並可能吸引更多國際合作與資金支持。另一方面，這也引發了其他國家如中國和俄羅斯的關注，因為他們也在積極推進自己的太空計畫。各方可能會在技術、資源和國際影響力上展開競爭，未來的太空政策與合作模式將受到此任務的影響。

technology.title: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
technology.summary: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

briefing.news_focus: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.
briefing.news_focus_zh: OpenAI進行高層人事調整，首席運營官Brad Lightcap將負責領導特別項目，而首席市場官Kate Rouch因健康原因將暫時離職，計劃在康復後回歸。
briefing.background: OpenAI作為人工智慧領域的領導者，面臨著快速變化的市場需求和技術挑戰。隨著AI技術的廣泛應用，企業內部結構的調整顯得尤為重要。Brad Lightcap的角色調整可能反映出OpenAI對於新項目開發的重視，而Kate Rouch的健康問題則突顯了高壓環境下員工的健康與福祉問題。
briefing.analysis: 這次人事變動可能會影響OpenAI的內部運作與外部形象。Brad Lightcap的特別項目領導角色可能將帶來創新機會，進一步推動公司的技術發展。然而，Kate Rouch的暫時離職可能會對市場推廣策略造成影響，特別是在公司需要強調其產品優勢和品牌形象的時期。各方可能會密切關注這些變化對OpenAI未來發展的影響。

politics.title: Iraq closes Shalamcheh crossing with Iran after airstrikes kill Iraqi
politics.summary: Sources said at least ​five Iraqis ‌were seriously wounded in an airstrike, which hit ‌a passenger reception ​area on the Iranian side

briefing.news_focus: Sources said at least ​five Iraqis ‌were seriously wounded in an airstrike, which hit ‌a passenger reception ​area on the Iranian side
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊拉克因空襲事件關閉與伊朗的Shalamcheh邊境口岸，該空襲造成至少五名伊拉克人重傷，襲擊發生在伊朗一側的乘客接待區。
briefing.background: Shalamcheh邊境口岸是伊拉克與伊朗之間重要的貿易與人員往來通道。近期，隨著地區緊張局勢升高，特別是在伊朗與其鄰國的軍事衝突中，該口岸的安全問題愈發受到關注。空襲事件的發生，可能與伊朗在該地區的軍事行動有關，並引發了伊拉克政府對邊境安全的重新評估。
briefing.analysis: 此次空襲事件引發伊拉克政府的強烈反應，關閉Shalamcheh口岸可能會影響雙邊貿易及人員流動，對當地經濟造成負面影響。伊朗方面可能會對此表示不滿，並加強對邊境的軍事部署，進一步加劇地區緊張局勢。此外，這一事件也可能引發國際社會對該地區安全局勢的關注，促使外部勢力介入調解。

politics.title: Trump seeks $1.5tn for defence alongside domestic spending cuts
politics.summary: The US president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

briefing.news_focus: The US president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普提出新預算，要求撥款1.5萬億美元用於國防，同時計劃將非國防開支削減10%，這將部分影響國內各項計劃。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府在國防支出上持續強調安全與軍事能力，這一預算提案反映出其對國內外威脅的評估。過去幾年，美國國防預算已顯著增加，而非國防開支的削減則可能影響社會福利、教育及基礎設施等領域。這一政策背景下，特朗普希望通過強化軍事來鞏固其政治基礎，並應對國內外的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的預算提案引發了民主黨與共和黨之間的激烈爭論。民主黨批評削減非國防開支將損害社會福利，影響弱勢群體，而共和黨則支持加強國防，認為這是保護國家安全的必要措施。此舉可能導致國會在預算通過過程中的對立加劇，並影響特朗普在2024年選舉中的支持度，特別是在選民對社會問題的關注日益增加的背景下。

politics.title: Cuba releases 2,000 prisoners amid Trump pressure, energy crisis
politics.summary: Cuba's government releases over 2,000 prisoners citing good behavior and health conditions as U.S. sanctions worsen the island's economic crisis.

briefing.news_focus: Cuba's government releases over 2,000 prisoners citing good behavior and health conditions as U.S. sanctions worsen the island's economic crisis.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 古巴政府在美國制裁加劇的背景下，釋放超過2,000名囚犯，理由為良好行為和健康狀況，這一舉措似乎是對特朗普政府施壓的回應。
briefing.background: 古巴長期以來受到美國的經濟制裁，這些制裁在特朗普任內進一步加強，導致古巴經濟面臨嚴重危機。古巴政府的這一釋放行動，可能旨在改善國內外形象，並緩解因經濟困境而引發的社會不滿。此外，古巴的醫療體系在疫情期間受到重創，釋放囚犯也可能是出於人道考量。
briefing.analysis: 古巴政府的釋放行動可能是為了減輕國內的社會壓力，並向國際社會展示其對人權的改善。然而，特朗普政府及其支持者可能會將此視為古巴政權在壓力下的妥協，進一步強化對古巴的制裁政策。另一方面，古巴的釋放行動也可能吸引國際社會的注意，促進與其他國家的外交關係，特別是在經濟重建方面。

economy.title: ‘The good old days are gone’: how will US prices stand as war in Iran surges on?
economy.summary: Beyond rising costs of gas and air travel, experts say this is likely just beginning of higher prices amid global volatility Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox As consumers watch the price of gasoline and airline tickets rise, experts say that the war in Iran will continue to drive up prices across the economy . “The good old days are gone,” said Christopher Tang, a professor at the UCLA Anderson School of Management who studies global supply chain management. “Right now we see the gasoline prices going up , but that is only part of the story. Everything will be more expensive.” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Beyond rising costs of gas and air travel, experts say this is likely just beginning of higher prices amid global volatility Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox As consumers watch the price of gasoline and airline tickets rise, experts say that the war in Iran will continue to drive up prices across the economy . “The good old days are gone,” said Christopher Tang, a professor at the UCLA Anderson School of Management who studies global supply chain management. “Right now we see the gasoline prices going up , but that is only part of the story. Everything will be more expensive.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著伊朗戰爭升級，美國的油價和航空票價持續上漲，專家預測這只是價格上漲的開始，整體經濟將面臨更高的成本壓力。
briefing.background: 伊朗的地緣政治緊張局勢對全球能源市場產生了深遠影響。美國作為主要的能源消費國，對油價波動特別敏感。過去幾年，隨著全球供應鏈的變化和需求的增加，價格已經出現上升趨勢。此次衝突加劇了市場的不確定性，導致投資者對未來的預期更加悲觀，進一步推高了成本。
briefing.analysis: 隨著伊朗戰爭的持續，油價和航空票價的上漲將影響消費者支出，可能導致經濟增長放緩。企業面臨更高的運輸和生產成本，可能會選擇將這些成本轉嫁給消費者，進一步推高通脹。政府可能需要採取措施來穩定市場，但這可能會面臨政治和經濟上的挑戰，特別是在選舉年期間。

economy.title: Cubans study oil tanker diplomacy for signs of progress in secret talks with US
economy.summary: Despite hostile rhetoric Trump let a Russian ship break his blockade – could it herald a Venezuela-style outcome? When a sanctioned Russian oil tanker, the Anatoly Kolodkin, docked at Cuba’s Matanzas oil terminal on Tuesday, unloading 700,000 barrels of crude , it was not immediately clear why the ship had been allowed to pass through Donald Trump’s oil blockade. In January, the US president had proclaimed on social media: “THERE WILL BE NO MORE OIL OR MONEY GOING TO CUBA – ZERO!” yet last week he told reporters, “If a country wants to send some oil into Cuba right now, I have no problem with it” – and waved the Russian ship through. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Despite hostile rhetoric Trump let a Russian ship break his blockade – could it herald a Venezuela-style outcome? When a sanctioned Russian oil tanker, the Anatoly Kolodkin, docked at Cuba’s Matanzas oil terminal on Tuesday, unloading 700,000 barrels of crude , it was not immediately clear why the ship had been allowed to pass through Donald Trump’s oil blockade. In January, the US president had proclaimed on social media: “THERE WILL BE NO MORE OIL OR MONEY GOING TO CUBA – ZERO!” yet last week he told reporters, “If a country wants to send some oil into Cuba right now, I have no problem with it” – and waved the Russian ship through. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與古巴之間的秘密談判可能出現進展，因為一艘受制裁的俄羅斯油輪在特朗普的封鎖下成功抵達古巴，卸下70萬桶原油，這引發了對未來局勢的猜測。
briefing.background: 古巴長期以來依賴外國石油供應，尤其是來自委內瑞拉的能源。特朗普政府對古巴的經濟制裁加劇了兩國之間的緊張關係。然而，近期俄羅斯油輪的抵達可能顯示出美國政策的微妙變化，尤其是在特朗普對古巴的強硬立場與其後來的言論之間的矛盾。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件凸顯了美國內部對古巴政策的分歧。一方面，特朗普的強硬派可能希望維持對古巴的經濟壓力，另一方面，特朗普的言論似乎暗示著對某些能源交易的默許。這可能使古巴在能源供應上獲得喘息空間，並可能促進與美國的進一步對話，尤其是在面對委內瑞拉的經濟困境時。各方需密切關注未來的外交動向及其對地區穩定的影響。

economy.title: How we won a refund from a cash-grabbing care home firm | Letters
economy.summary: One reader shares their experience of fighting to receive the money they were owed, while Roy Grimwood offers insight into the disastrous effects of a flawed economic model As witness to the cash-grabbing nature of these businesses ( The great care home cash grab: how private equity turned vulnerable elderly people into human ATMs, 28 March ), I would like to draw your attention to a specific practice: that of trying to deny grieving families the balance of fees owed to them when a resident dies in the home with full weeks already paid for. I had already heard of this from someone else, so I was on the alert when the same thing happened to us. We were told that it was not their “policy to refund” when, policy or not, a careful reading of the contract showed that the money was owed. We appealed, and were successful. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: One reader shares their experience of fighting to receive the money they were owed, while Roy Grimwood offers insight into the disastrous effects of a flawed economic model As witness to the cash-grabbing nature of these businesses ( The great care home cash grab: how private equity turned vulnerable elderly people into human ATMs, 28 March ), I would like to draw your attention to a specific practice: that of trying to deny grieving families the balance of fees owed to them when a resident dies in the home with full weeks already paid for. I had already heard of this from someone else, so I was on the alert when the same thing happened to us. We were told that it was not their “policy to refund” when, policy or not, a careful reading of the contract showed that the money was owed. We appealed, and were successful. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一位讀者分享了與一家私營護理院爭取退款的經歷，揭示了該行業內部存在的剝削性經濟模式，特別是對於已故居民的家庭拒絕退款的做法。
briefing.background: 護理院行業近年來受到私營資本的影響，許多企業為了追求利潤而忽視了對老年人的基本照護責任。這種經濟模式導致了對脆弱群體的剝削，並引發了社會對護理服務質量的廣泛關注。隨著人口老齡化，護理院的需求日益增加，卻也伴隨著不當經營和不透明的收費政策，進一步加劇了家庭的經濟負擔。
briefing.analysis: 這則新聞突顯了護理院經營者與家庭之間的利益衝突。護理院為了維護自身利潤，往往採取不合理的退款政策，這使得家庭在面對親人過世時，還需承擔額外的經濟壓力。讀者的成功申訴顯示了消費者維權的重要性，可能促使更多家庭質疑並挑戰不公正的政策。然而，若無法有效監管，這種剝削行為仍可能持續，對於整體行業的信譽造成長期損害。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸集中於國際政治與經濟的緊張局勢，以及科技領域的持續創新與挑戰。伊拉克與伊朗的衝突加劇，導致邊境口岸關閉，這一事件可能對地區穩定及能源市場產生深遠影響，尤其在美國油價上漲的背景下，顯示出地緣政治對經濟的直接影響。此外，古巴釋放囚犯的舉措似乎是對特朗普政府施壓的回應，也可能影響美古之間的秘密談判進展，進一步影響兩國的經濟關係。在科技方面，歐洲的數據安全事件提醒各國在數位轉型過程中須加強防護措施，以防範潛在的網路威脅。
